3107870.name: Highland Keep
3107870.description:
Highland Keep is a third-person survival strategy set in the dark, mist-covered medieval Scotland. As a clan leader, you will engage in base building, colony management, survival mechanics, and real-time action combat in an open world.

Total Freedom of Castle Building

Design and build any castle you want, without presets or limits. Construct walls, towers, interiors, traps, crafting stations, storage rooms, and smaller structures piece by piece. Every keep is unique, functional, and fully explorable your fortress reflects your strategy and your character.

A Fully Simulated Living World

The world runs in real time, even when you are not directly involved. Other clans exist, expand, fight, trade, and raid on their own. Choose diplomacy, alliances, trade, or total war. Your decisions shape regional power, borders, and survival.

Character-Driven Progression

Character development directly affects gameplay systems unlocking advanced building options, improving clan management, influencing morale, and enhancing combat abilities. How you grow your character defines how your settlement and clan evolve.
3107870.supported_languages:
英语*, 波兰语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 捷克语, 匈牙利语, 日语, 韩语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文, 繁体中文, 土耳其语, 乌克兰语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
